title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 266.460 - Violation a misdemeanor, what constitutes offense
text:
266.460.  Violation a misdemeanor, what constitutes offense. — Any person violating the provisions of sections 266.410 to 266.460 shall be guilty of a misdemeanor. Each day the provisions of sections 266.410 to 266.460 are violated shall be a separate offense.
(L. 1953 p. 6 § 5)
